command.branch.description: Create a branch of the current conversation at this point

command.diff.description: View uncommitted changes and per-turn diffs
command.effort.description: Set effort level for model usage
command.effort.usage:
Usage: /effort [low|medium|high|max|xhigh|auto]

Effort levels:
- low: Quick, straightforward implementation
- medium: Balanced approach with standard testing
- high: Comprehensive implementation with extensive testing
- max: Maximum capability (Opus 4.6 / 4.7, gpt-5.x, o-series)
- xhigh: 32k thinking budget (Opus 4.7 only)
- auto: Use the default effort level for your model
command.effort.invalid: Invalid argument: {{arg}}. Valid options: low, medium, high, max, xhigh, auto
command.effort.envOverrideTransient: Not applied: CLAUDE_CODE_EFFORT_LEVEL={{env}} overrides effort this session, and {{value}} is session-only (nothing saved)
command.effort.envOverrideTakeover: CLAUDE_CODE_EFFORT_LEVEL={{env}} overrides this session — clear it and {{value}} takes over
command.effort.envStillOverrides: Cleared effort from settings, but CLAUDE_CODE_EFFORT_LEVEL={{env}} still controls this session

budget.notSet: No session budget cap is currently set
budget.exceeded: Session budget cap of ${{limit}} USD exceeded (actual spend ${{spent}}). Use /budget to adjust or start a new session.
budget.invalidArg: Invalid argument: enter a USD amount greater than 0, e.g. /budget 5
budget.usage:
Usage: /budget [amount]
  /budget 5       → cap this session at $5
  /budget         → show current budget
  /budget /clear  → clear budget cap
save.empty: Conversation is empty; nothing to save
save.invalidName: Name may only contain letters, digits, hyphens and underscores
diagnoseRelay.usage:
Usage: /diagnose-relay [URL]
  /diagnose-relay              → probe the configured relay
  /diagnose-relay https://...  → probe the given relay
diagnoseRelay.notConfigured: No relay configured. Set ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL or OPENAI_API_BASE first.
